items.title: RT by @WhiteHouse: Why is First Lady Melania Trump (@FLOTUS) considered the most consequential First Lady in modern American history? Her impact is evident through measurable results. In the past 18 months, First Lady Melania Trump has: Child Protection: Championed the TAKE IT DOWN Act, new federal law, which protects children and victims from AI-generated exploitation and non-consensual intimate imagery. Foster Care: Advanced the Fostering the Future Act, new legislation that passed the U.S. House of Representatives with full bipartisan support. Education and Technology: Launched Fostering the Future Together, uniting nearly 50 nations and global technology leaders—including Microsoft, Google, OpenAI, Adobe, Meta, Palantir, and X—to empower children through education & technology. Diplomacy: Convened the largest gathering of First Spouses from around the world ever hosted at the White House to advance international cooperation through Fostering the Future Together. Foster Care Support: Secured $30 million to expand housing opportunities for young adults transitioning out of foster care, in partnership with @HUDgov and @SecretaryTurner. Diplomacy: Became the first First Lady in history to address the United Nations Security Council, delivering her landmark "Peace Through Education" address. Humanitarian: Facilitated four (4) reunifications of Ukrainian & Russian children with their families, establishing child welfare as a central focus of international diplomacy. Diplomacy: Sent a direct peace appeal to Russia's President Vladimir Putin, urging action for children displaced by the war // The Peace Letter Technology and Youth: Launched the inaugural Presidential AI Challenge, the largest youth AI initiative in American history, with over 20,000 participants, approximately 2,500 submissions, and competitors from all 50 states, Puerto Rico, Washington, D.C., and Department of War schools overseas. Technology and Education: Hosted a nationwide K–12 AI Workshop in partnership with Zoom, engaging nearly 3,000 schools across the United States. Foster Youth Education: Established a network of leading universities to expand scholarships and educational opportunities for youth through Fostering the Future. Foster Youth Financial Security: Launched Fostering the Future Accounts with @USTreasury and @SecScottBessent, enabling children in foster care to begin adulthood with savings & investment accounts // Ownership Society. Technology and Government: Convened the White House AI Task Force, bringing together leaders from technology, education, and government to shape the future of AI education in the U.S. Foster Care Policy: Championed the Fostering the Future Executive Order, establishing a government-wide initiative led by @ACFHHS to improve educational opportunities, financial security, and long-term outcomes for children in foster care. Humanitarian: Initiated Freedom Process for Israeli Hostages in Gaza. Regardless of political perspective, the scope of this First Lady’s work is extraordinary. History will judge First Ladies by measurable impact, not headlines. By this standard, First Lady Melania Trump has established one of the most substantive legacies in modern history.

items.title: Sierra Leone drops treason charge against ex-president over attempted coup
items.summary: Ernest Bai Koroma was arrested in 2023 after gunmen broke into an armoury and some jails, freeing inmates.

items.title: Oil traders warn market is close to running on empty as Hormuz shuts again
items.summary: Stockpiles that acted as shock absorbers early in Iran war are running low as crucial waterway closes again

items.title: Gold Steadies as Soft Inflation, War Risk Cloud Fed Rate Outlook
items.summary: Gold steadied, as traders weighed softer-than-expected inflation data against escalating attacks in the Middle East for clues to the Federal Reserve’s interest-rate path.

items.title: Iran War Drives New Investment in US LNG, S&P Global Says
items.summary: The Iran war, and its disruptions across global energy markets, is spurring investments for new US liquefied natural gas export infrastructure, according to consulting firm S&P Global.

items.title: US will not win Iran war from the air, Trump’s ex-defence chief warns
items.summary: Mark Esper tells FT more bombing will not change Tehran’s behaviour, as president vows to step up attacks

items.title: South Korea raises rates to battle inflation pressure from Iran war
items.summary: Central bank’s first move under Shin Hyun-song comes amid concern over won weakness and reliance on energy imports

items.title: India Raises Export Levies on Diesel and Jet Fuel
items.summary: India increased taxes on exports of ‌diesel and aviation turbine fuel as the collapse of the US-Iran interim peace deal and renewed hostilities have choked oil flows again tightening global fuel markets.

items.title: EQT Raises Offer Price for Kakaku.com Above Bid by LY, Bain
items.summary: EQT AB is increasing its tender offer price for Japan’s Kakaku.com Inc., escalating its bidding war with the duo of LY Corp. and Bain Capital for the online data firm.

items.title: As of now, two people are confirmed to have been killed in Kyiv in last night's Russian missile strike. My condolences to their families and loved ones. Five people have been injured, including a child. The Russians have damaged a residential high-rise, warehouse facilities, and vehicles. Russian strikes on the Kharkiv region have left four people injured. The region was attacked with drones and a guided aerial bomb. Ordinary homes and entirely civilian sites have been damaged, including a movie theater and tennis courts. In Sumy, a public park was struck, and in the region, a tractor brigade was targeted. Apartment buildings were damaged in Zaporizhzhia. Damage has been reported at power grid facilities in the Vinnytsia, Zhytomyr, Mykolaiv, and Donetsk regions. In total, the Russians launched 13 missiles, including eight ballistic ones, and 151 drones. This was already the sixth ballistic attack on Kyiv in July alone. Moscow is counting on ballistic terror and continues its strikes, so it's critical now to speed up deliveries of interceptors for our air defense. Every package matters, and everything we have agreed with our partners must arrive on time. The swiftness of these deliveries helps save our people’s lives and takes the fight out of Russia. Thank you to everyone who is helping.

items.title: Ukraine - Russia war latest : Explosions rock Kyiv after Moscow launches ballistic missile attack
French Power Exports Jump 36% to Record on Nuclear Output Boost
items.summary: French power exports surged to a record in the first half of 2026 as a rebound in nuclear output and rising renewable generation left the country with a big surplus of low-cost electricity to sell across Europe.

items.title: Ukrainian Drone Attack Killed Chief Engineer at Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant , Russia Says
US Drivers Are Again Paying More Than $5 a Gallon for Diesel
items.summary: American drivers are once again paying more than $5 a gallon for diesel, with a fresh round of hostilities in the Middle East raising the specter of more war-induced inflation.
